prior_step1.note: Step1 schema/policy/compiler genuine-path scaffold retained; synthetic T2 still authority.

prior_step2_empty_media.note: Empty-media disposition retained; this landing deepens acquisition/rights checklist without clearing step2.

deepen_reason: Step2 remains blocked on Class F human media. Prior landing confirmed empty media trees; this landing adds a hash-bound acquisition/rights checklist that enumerates every Row068-rights + copies-only staging gate required before GENUINE_ANNOTATED_MEDIA_CORPUS_ABSENT can clear — without inventing media, fabricating rights hashes, decoding PCM, touching Row073, mutating shared CSVs, claiming COMPLETE, or emitting HOLD090+.

blocker_classes.name: EXTERNAL_HUMAN_GENUINE_ANNOTATED_MEDIA_ACQUISITION_AND_RIGHTS_GATE
blocker_classes.summary: Acquisition/rights checklist is formalized and currently open on 14/15 items. Live reaffirmation: media/row109 and reviews/row109 empty/absent; 0 genuine manifest cases; 0 rights decision files staged; hold CLI remains fail-closed.
blocker_classes.fail_closed_until: Human completes AR-01..AR-14: rights-cleared genuine annotated copies staged under media/row109 with human_gold + rights_decision_sha256 (decode_invoked=false), partition/coverage floors met, recompile clears GENUINE_ANNOTATED_MEDIA_CORPUS_ABSENT, then combined frame/contact/audio review + held-out runtime proof

items.title: External human source authority
items.requirement: Human/operator selects real annotated audio/video clips; agents must not invent or synthesize substitute genuine media.
items.evidence_note: open — media/row109 empty; no genuine_annotated_media_copy cases; no rights decisions staged

items.title: No Row073 / full-library PCM decode path
items.requirement: Acquisition must be copies-only staging; decode_invoked=false; pcm_bytes=null; live_full_library_scan=false; Row073 PCM left alone.
items.evidence_note: open — media/row109 empty; no genuine_annotated_media_copy cases; no rights decisions staged; policy pcm_decode_allowed=false

items.title: Row068 rights decision schema compliance
items.requirement: Each staged copy must bind a Row068-valid audio_rights_provenance_decision with rights_decision_sha256 (64 hex) over the decision payload.
items.evidence_note: Row068 authority accepted globally, but zero Row109 subject rights decisions exist under media/row109

items.title: License / use dimensions allow internal_qa dataset bind
items.requirement: decision.status=pass, authority_granted=true; dataset_use_allowed=allowed; output_use.requested_use includes internal_qa or equivalent allowed path; license not prohibited/unknown-blocked.
items.evidence_note: open — media/row109 empty; no genuine_annotated_media_copy cases; no rights decisions staged

items.title: Commercial / attribution / derivative / redistribution recorded
items.requirement: commercial_noncommercial_constraints, attribution, derivative_permission, redistribution, generated_output_terms, and source_pack_restrictions must be complete and non-contradictory for the intended bind.
items.evidence_note: open — media/row109 empty; no genuine_annotated_media_copy cases; no rights decisions staged

items.title: Copy path under media/row109
items.requirement: copy_path must live under Plan/Instructions/QA/Evidence/Wave64/media/row109 (schema pattern) and resolve as a real file.

items.title: media_sha256 identity match
items.requirement: Claimed media_sha256 must equal sha256 of staged copy bytes (compiler fail-closed on mismatch).
items.evidence_note: open — media/row109 empty; no genuine_annotated_media_copy cases; no rights decisions staged

items.title: human_gold + rights_bound annotation
items.requirement: annotation.annotator_role=human_gold and annotation.rights_bound=true on every genuine_annotated_media_copy case.
items.evidence_note: open — media/row109 empty; no genuine_annotated_media_copy cases; no rights decisions staged

items.title: Event-family / material / footwear / adversarial coverage floors
items.requirement: calibration+held_out reference_truth must cover event_families=['footstep', 'heel_strike', 'body_contact', 'clothing', 'prop', 'room_ambience', 'occlusion', 'multi_actor', 'cut_boundary', 'ambiguous_material', 'intentional_silence']; materials=['hardwood', 'carpet', 'tile', 'concrete', 'ambiguous_surface']; footwear=['bare_foot', 'soft_shoe', 'sneaker', 'boot', 'hard_heel']; adversarial roles=['filename_semantic_mismatch', 'generated_candidate_truth_contamination', 'partition_leak_attempt', 'wrong_material_timing_drift'].
items.evidence_note: open — media/row109 empty; no genuine_annotated_media_copy cases; no rights decisions staged

items.title: Copies-only bind flags
items.requirement: media_locator: kind=genuine_annotated_media_copy; pcm_bytes=null; decode_invoked=false; live_full_library_scan=false; rights_decision_sha256 present.
items.evidence_note: open — media/row109 empty; no genuine_annotated_media_copy cases; no rights decisions staged

items.title: Recompile clears GENUINE_ANNOTATED_MEDIA_CORPUS_ABSENT
items.requirement: After staging, compile_wave64_audio_benchmark_corpus must report genuine_annotated_media_corpus.present=true without inventing media.

items.title: Combined frame/contact/audio review under reviews/row109
items.requirement: Post-bind human combined review artifacts required; reviews tree currently empty/absent.

items.title: Held-out runtime proof without truth contamination
items.requirement: Held-out runtime proof remains blocked; contamination probe must stay fail-closed.

items.title: No COMPLETE / Status flip from checklist alone
items.requirement: This packet never grants row_complete, product completion, CSV Status flip, or HOLD090+ emission.
items.evidence_note: packet explicitly row_complete=false; product_completion_claimed=false; csv deferred; HOLD090+ not in scope

status_flip_forbidden_until: AR-01..AR-14 checklist items satisfied with live staged copies
media/row109 contains rights-cleared genuine_annotated_media_copy cases with human_gold
rights_decision_sha256 bound per copy via Row068 schema; decode_invoked=false during bind
combined frame/contact/audio review executed under reviews/row109
held-out runtime proof executed without contaminating reference truth

decision.safe_next_action: Human/external: execute acquisition/rights checklist AR-01..AR-14 — obtain rights-cleared annotated copies, stamp Row068-valid rights_decision_sha256 per copy, stage under Plan/Instructions/QA/Evidence/Wave64/media/row109 with human_gold (decode_invoked=false), meet partition/coverage floors, recompile, then combined frame/contact/audio review. Agents must not invent media, fabricate rights hashes, decode library PCM, touch Row073, start 074/076/077 library, mutate shared CSVs, claim COMPLETE, or emit HOLD090+.

recommended_codex_follow_up: Leave Row109 blocked on Class F human acquisition/rights intake; optional CSV Notes sync via mutator only. Prefer human media staging against AR-01..AR-14 — do not invent clips or fabricate rights_decision_sha256.
